task.title: Verify typed text upload on web/native
task.objective: Make typed-text upload use safe web FormData file objects and show explicit unavailable guidance on native instead of relying on Blob object URLs that may fail outside web.
acceptance_criteria: Text input upload works on web by appending a Blob/File directly to FormData with filename and text/plain type.
Native typed-text upload does not attempt unsupported URL.createObjectURL/Blob upload and explains that typed text conversion is web-only until native file synthesis support exists.
Existing picked-file upload behavior remains intact.
TypeScript compile and Expo web build pass from Hermes terminal.
task.stop_condition: Only implement this bounded text-upload compatibility task; do not modify unrelated screens or backend code.
